ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES PAGEREF _Toc135235318 \h 6 2.1 C-000-EX67 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc135235319 \h 6 3. ADD TRANSACTION PARAMETER PICK TO TOTE PAGEREF _Toc135235320 \h 7 3.1 EX67 Pick to tote Param 1-1, 567-567 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc135235323 \h 7 3.2 EX67 Pick to tote Param 567-567 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc135235324 \h 8 4.1 EX67 Pack from Tote Param 3-3, 567-567 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc135235325 \h 9 4.2 EX67 Pack from tote Param 567-567 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc135235326 \h 10 1 . GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX 67 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX 67 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. 3 . ADD EX67 TRANSACTION PARAMETER S EX67 Pick to tote Param 1-1, 567-567 Enablement Navigate to Transaction Parameter s in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “ Pick To Tote ” to search . We will need to change param byte 1-1 to “Verify pick by scanning item and qty” if it has not already done so . Select Transaction Name Pick to Tote Multis and then click on the parameters tab to display transaction parameters. Click the Program Template Button Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. Repeat steps 1 -6 for any remaining pick to tote transactions needing EX67 Functionality EX 67 Pick to tote Param 567-567 Enablement Select Transaction Name Pick to Tote and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the edit button Check the box to enable EX 67 custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. EX67 P ack from T ote Param 3-3 , 567-567 Enablement Navigate to Transaction Parameters in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “P ck from Tote” to search. We will need to change param byte 3 - 3 to “ Scan item and q uan t it y” if it has not already done so . Select Transaction Name Pck from Tote and then click on the parameters tab to display transaction parameters. Click the Program Template Button Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. EX67 P ack from tote Param 567-567 Enablement Select Transaction Name Pack from Tote and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the edit button Check the box to enable EX67 custom functionality. CLICK SAVE.
